citation: Pre-HUD-ML-2023-05 deferral; grandfathering is v2 work
comment: Hand-calc: endorsement_date=2014-08-01 is before 2023-03-20 effective date of HUD ML 2023-05. Predicate must raise NotImplementedError, never silently apply current rates (Pitfall 5: silent grandfathering would understate user's MIP burden).
